title: RecipeBuff
description: Makes the game challenging with advanced recipes, and toughened mobs.
body:
**This datapack changes many recipes, like the wooden pickaxe, to be much more complicated and tedious to create. Along with changes to crafting, mobs have been buffed to annihilate you in three seconds. When you are injured, you become weaker and have effects like slowness.**

_Recipes changed include (but not limited to):_
- All tools (except shovels)
- Crafting Table and Furnace
- Armor


_How to install:_

If you are adding this into a pre-existing world:
- Unzip the file
- Place into a minecraft save e.g. C:\users\Optim00se\AppData\Roaming\\.minecraft\saves\world\datapacks\
- **If the datapack does not show any message upon loading the world, try /reload**

If you are creating a new world:
- Unzip the file
- In the Create New World menu, click More
- Click the Data Packs button, go to Open Pack Folder
- Navigate to the unzipped folder that has RecipeBuff
- Select it to be used for world creation.
- **If the datapack does not show any message upon loading the world, try /reload**

Any issues? My username on Discord is @optim00se
